name: get_property_timeseries
description: Retrieve historical time-series data for a thing's property over a specified date range. Returns timestamped value entries perfect for charting sensor trends, analyzing patterns, or computing averages. Supports aggregation intervals.

parameters.name: propertyId
parameters.description: The UUID of the property to query history for.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start of the time range in ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End of the time range in ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Aggregation interval in seconds. If set, values are averaged over this interval.
